name: FDIC Quarterly Banking Profile — Selected Indicators
desc: Dense financial tables — bank performance aggregates, multi-level headers, dollar amounts, and percentages across quarterly and annual periods.

name: FDIC — Loan Performance Table
desc: Loan performance data — deeply nested row labels for loan categories, many numeric columns with dollar amounts and ratios.

name: Federal Reserve H.4.1 — Reserve Balances
desc: Weekly Fed balance sheet — hierarchical indented row labels, precise dollar figures in tightly aligned columns.

name: Federal Reserve H.4.1 — Condition Statement
desc: Consolidated balance sheet of all Federal Reserve Banks — assets and liabilities in tabular layout.

name: CMS Medicare Physician Fee Schedule (CY 2026)
desc: Payment policy changes with tables embedded in narrative — conversion factors, payment rates, RVU adjustments.

name: IRS Form 1040 — U.S. Individual Income Tax Return
desc: The most-used U.S. tax form — structured form layout with labeled rows, numeric entry fields, checkboxes.

name: WHO Indicators — Summary Classification Table
desc: 100 core health indicators mapped to domains — dense classification grid with check marks across categories.

name: WHO — Additional Indicators Definition Table
desc: Multi-column reference tables — indicator name, definition, disaggregation, and data sources in text-heavy cells.
